[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000011 2
1 0010101 3
2 0101111 5
3 1001001 3
4 1011010 4
5 1111010 5
6 1011111 6
7 1110000 3

12 21 1111111 a
23 32 1111011 6
34 43 1111010 5 match 5
45 54 1110110 5
56 65 0110111 5
67 76 0100101 3
70 07 0100101 3

24 42 1111001 5

71 17 0101111 5 match 2

47 74 1010101 4
50 05 0110110 4
61 16 0101111 5 match 2
72 27 1111101 6
